title: Banking and financial statistics - Bank of Canada
content:
## Banking and financial statistics
Search our statistical data tables —a compilation of banking and financial indicators, including the Bank of Canada’s assets and liabilities, credit and monetary aggregates, chartered banks data and selected financial market statistics.
For data from May 2018 and earlier, see the Historical Banking Financial Statistics and Weekly Financial Statistics publications.
